_comment: Golden-audio fixture book (ops-11). Fixed (id, voice, text) lines run through the REAL Kokoro v1 model; the synthesized length is asserted against kokoro-baseline.json within tolerance. Voices are from the English Kokoro subset (af_/am_/bf_/bm_). Lines deliberately cover text-normalization classes (numbers, quotes, abbreviations, punctuation, a multi-sentence group) so a phonemiser regression that shifts duration is caught. Keep clauses short to bound synth time. Re-bless kokoro-baseline.json (npm run test:golden-audio -- --bless) whenever you edit this file.

lines.text: The lighthouse keeper watched the grey sea roll in.
In 1999, all 7 of them boarded the 4:15 train to Dover.
Dr. Hollis and Mr. Vane arrived at St. Aldric's before noon.
"Wait," she said, "did you really mean it — all of it?"
He paused at the door. The hallway was silent. Then he stepped through.
